ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frequency_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency band */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Range of frequencies in Hz */,
  "wavelength_range" TEXT /* Range of wavelengths in meters */,
  "propagation_characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of propagation in the band */,
  "typical_use" TEXT /* Typical applications of the band */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the frequency band */,
  "channel_capacity" REAL /* Channel capacity of the frequency band */,
  "modulation_techniques" TEXT /* Modulation techniques used in the band */,
  "guard_band" REAL /* Guard band between adjacent channels */,
  "duplex_mode" TEXT /* Duplex mode of transmission (e.g., FDD, TDD) */,
  "band_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectrum_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrum allocation */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band allocated */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service using the band */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation was made */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation expires */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the allocation */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "allocation_type" TEXT /* Type of allocation (e.g., permanent, temporary, trial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectrum_allocations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectrum_allocations_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES frequency_bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., communication, navigation, broadcasting) */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used by the service (e.g., analog, digital, satellite) */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Geographic area covered by the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency plan */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service for which the plan is created */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band used in the plan */,
  "planning_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was created */,
  "planning_details" TEXT /* Detailed planning information */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the plan */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was approved */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., draft, approved, implemented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_plans_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_plans_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES frequency_bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band regulated */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Geographic or administrative area where the regulation applies */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  "regulation_details" TEXT /* Details of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES frequency_bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged out */,
  "login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, allocation, plan) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
